name: Yashima & Co.,Ltd.
summary: Yashima & Co.,Ltd., a trading company, provides products for railway vehicles, railway car base equipment, railway operation equipment, and industrial electronic parts in Japan and internationally. The company engages in the sale, maintenance, and import/export of railway related products and industrial electronic parts. It offers body and bogie parts, electrical components, coupling devices, pneumatic and engine equipment, connectors, cables, terminal blocks, materials, chemicals, washing soaps, and maintenance work equipment for railways. The company also provides door mirrors, EV chargers, and automotive connectors, as well as surface processing and press working products for cars; industrial connectors, terminal blocks, media converters, managed switches, antenna integrated wireless LAN adapters, Ethernet extenders, and cleaning and energy saving equipment for industrial machinery; and flooring and wash soap products for the defense industry. In addition, it offers EV chargers, washing soaps, deodorants, glass coating products, ultra fine bubble generators, and storage batteries, as well as maintenance work, cleaning, and energy saving equipment to the public facilities; and power connectors to the power industry. The company was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
